hero.name: The Newsstand
hero.tagline: A quiet reading list of newsletters worth keeping
hero.description: Hand-picked newsletters we subscribe to at the StoicSoft studio. No paid placements, no sponsored bumps, no referral rings. Added when we’ve read a dozen issues.

items.name: The Margin
items.description: Clara Figueira’s weekly note from the StoicSoft studio. Quiet, unsponsored, never a listicle. 172 issues and counting.

items.name: log.stoicsoft.com
items.description: Wednesday engineering notes from the team behind ServerCompass, Aether, and 1DevTool. Dense, honest, no listicles.

items.name: Wren Holloway
items.tagline: Long essays on the slow work
items.description: Six to nine long essays a year from Wren at the StoicSoft studio. When it shows up, you clear your evening.

items.name: Shipcraft Notes
items.description: Jonas Park’s accompanying notes to the Shipcraft cohort. Honest about revenue, pricing decisions, and when to quit.

items.name: Field & Form Digest
items.tagline: The Friday letter from our quarterly
items.description: A short Friday companion to Field & Form, the StoicSoft studio’s quarterly magazine. Links, fragments, one recommendation.

items.name: Routine Diary
items.tagline: Anya Park on the slow software life
items.description: Anya Park’s journal from anya.garden — notes between essays, a touch more personal than the main blog.

items.name: ServerCompass Monthly
items.description: A very public monthly incident report from the ServerCompass team — every outage, every mitigation, every lesson learned.

items.name: Signal FM Show Notes
items.tagline: Weekly show notes from our podcast
items.description: The companion newsletter to Signal FM. Transcripts, timestamps, and one follow-up question from each guest.

items.name: Elena Faro · Sundays
items.tagline: A photograph a week, with a paragraph
items.description: Elena’s Sunday dispatch — one plate from her photo journal and a short note about the frame before it was made.

items.name: Material Weekly
items.tagline: A new font, icon, or object every Monday
items.description: Clara’s companion newsletter to the Material shelf directory. One new resource every Monday morning.

items.name: Open Roots Quarterly
items.description: Four letters a year from Open Roots — sapling counts, field-day stories, honest accounting of where donations went.

items.name: Aether Changelog
items.description: Aether’s product email — what shipped, what got deleted, what we changed our mind about. No marketing gloss.
